untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book depth metrics (bid size vs ask size comparison) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. The core condition 'bid size significantly exceeds ask size' cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators. Additionally, the specific entry mechanism ('join the bid in pro-rata order fill markets') and exit condition ('sell when bid price moves up one or more ticks') require market microstructure data and order book state that are beyond the scope of OHLCV-based backtesting.
translation_notes: This is a microstructure-based market-making signal that depends on real-time order book imbalance detection and pro-rata fill mechanics specific to certain futures markets (CME Eurodollar). Standard backtesting engines operating on OHLCV data cannot replicate the order book state or pro-rata fill behavior required for this strategy. Parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) were marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred from the signal description.
